description_long: This object is a three-wheeled electric delivery motorcycle, featuring a large, boxy cargo compartment mounted at the rear. The cargo box is predominantly yellow with blue side panels and appears to be insulated for transporting goods. The vehicle has a streamlined, modern design with a black chassis, yellow fenders, and blue accent panels along the body. The front of the motorcycle includes a headlight, side mirrors, and handlebars, while the rear cargo box has vertical red reflectors for visibility. The wheels are solid with yellow trim, and the overall build suggests it is designed for urban delivery tasks, offering stability and ample storage capacity. The seat is single and ergonomically shaped, indicating it is intended for a solo delivery worker.
description: A modern three-wheeled electric delivery motorcycle with a large yellow and blue insulated cargo box at the rear, designed for urban deliveries.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headlight, handlebars, side mirrors, and the front wheel, with the cargo box visible behind.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined body, large rear cargo box, and the single seat for the rider.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large yellow cargo box with blue side panels and vertical red reflectors, as well as the two rear wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cargo box, ergonomic seat, and the vehicle's modern design with blue and yellow accents.
attribute_delivery_bag_or_box: Large, hard-shell insulated cargo box mounted at the rear, rectangular in shape, yellow with blue side panels, no visible straps or compartments.
